summary: Completed comprehensive testing of social media scheduler web app. Backend APIs (10/10 tests passed), frontend UI flows, and core integrations are working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Stripe payment button selector may need data-testid for better testing
Social account connection buttons need data-testid attributes for robust testing

passed_tests: Landing page loads with navigation, hero, features, pricing
User signup flow with email, password, name
Dashboard displays correct stats (1 total post, 0 scheduled, 0 published, 0 connected accounts)
Create post page with text area and platform selection
AI content generation using GPT-5.2 (692 characters generated)
Post creation saves as draft and shows in content library
Content library displays posts with filters
Billing page shows pricing plans with Stripe and Razorpay options
Backend API authentication with JWT tokens
Backend stats endpoint returns correct counts

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All core flows working, minor selector improvements needed)
